verse.name: v1
verse.lines: How blessed I am to have your heart To be your groom (bride) for the rest of your life All the old heartbreaks and waiting are worth it Just to be with you in Gods destined time

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My heart was captivated by many girls (man) before I thought that was true love, but I was a fool Then one day you came into my life Not knowing how, but its all Gods designed

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To be with you in your weakness To stay with you in pain To be faithful in hardships To love you no matter what To trust you at all times To dance with you in the storm To sing with you in the drought To not give up because I love you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I know our future will not always be a bed of roses But having the Lord Is enough my dear I will love you with my everything For that's what the Lord has done for me (yeaaahh).

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I finally found the love of my life My heart finds rest in her eyes (his arms) Just waiting for Gods blessing to unite our hearts
